Purpose: DBeaver is a free, multi-platform database management tool offering extensive features for developers, SQL programmers, and administrators across a wide range of database systems.
Description: Free universal database tool and SQL client

Purpose: To provide a powerful parser generator tool and its associated runtime libraries for defining and recognizing structured text languages across multiple target platforms.
Description: ANTLR (ANother Tool for Language Recognition) is a powerful parser generator for reading, processing, executing, or translating structured text or binary files.

Purpose: SymPy is a comprehensive open-source Python library designed for symbolic mathematics, enabling capabilities like algebra, calculus, and equation solving within the scientific Python ecosystem.
Description: A computer algebra system written in pure Python

Purpose: The repository provides a reusable library for detecting programming languages in code repositories, filtering files, suppressing generated files, and generating language breakdown graphs.
Description: Language Savant. If your repository's language is being reported incorrectly, send us a pull request!

Purpose: To provide a lake format that enables a Realtime Lakehouse Architecture with Flink and Spark for both streaming and batch operations.
Description: Apache Paimon is a lake format that enables building a Realtime Lakehouse Architecture with Flink and Spark for both streaming and batch operations.

Purpose: Lacinia is a Clojure library providing a full, backend-agnostic implementation of the GraphQL specification, acting as a high-performance query execution engine.
Description: GraphQL implementation in pure Clojure

Purpose: This repository contains the source code for JetBrains MPS, a powerful platform designed to enable users to define and develop their own Domain Specific Languages (DSLs) with a comprehensive projectional editing and code generation environment.
Description: JetBrains Meta programming System

Purpose: The repository aims to recreate the classic Visual Basic 6 IDE and its limited language support using C# and Avalonia as a fun, toy project.
Description: A recreation of the classic Visual Basic 6 IDE and language in C# with Avalonia

Domain: Big Data Processing, Code Generation, Optimization
Purpose: To provide a blazing fast parallel big data processing framework for Python data science by compiling pipelines to optimized LLVM bytecode.
Description: Tuplex is a parallel big data processing framework that runs data science pipelines written in Python at the speed of compiled code. Tuplex has similar Python APIs to Apache Spark or Dask, but rather than invoking the Python interpreter, Tuplex generates optimized LLVM bytecode for the given pipeline and input data set.

Purpose: This repository provides comprehensive language support for Lua 5.4 within the Godot Engine 4.x, offering full integration, advanced tooling, and a complete runtime environment for game development.
Description: Lua language support for Godot Engine

Domain: Code Formatting, Source-to-Source Transformation, Machine Learning
Purpose: This repository provides a universal, machine learning-driven code formatter that leverages ANTLR grammars to automatically format code for various programming languages.
Description: Language-agnostic pretty-printing through machine learning (uh, like, is this possible? YES, apparently).

Purpose: This repository provides the C# target implementation and runtime libraries for ANTLR 4, allowing C# applications to integrate and utilize parsers, lexers, and visitors generated from ANTLR grammars.
Description: The original, highly-optimized C# Target for ANTLR 4

Purpose: To provide comprehensive IDE support in Visual Studio Code for authoring, validating, and debugging ANTLR4 grammars.
Description: ANTLR4 language support for Visual Studio Code

Purpose: To provide a pure Java library for parsing HTML and extracting data using a re-implemented W3C XPath 1.0 standard, built on Jsoup and Antlr4.
Description: 纯Java实现的支持W3C Xpath 1.0标准语法的HTML解析器。A html parser with xpath base on Jsoup and Antlr4. Maybe it is the best in java.Just try it.

Purpose: To provide a grammar-agnostic, reusable code completion engine for ANTLR4 and antlr-ng based parsers, enabling sophisticated editor support.

Purpose: To provide the runtime library for ANTLR4-generated parsers in the Rust programming language.
Description: ANTLR4 parser generator runtime for Rust programming laguage

Purpose: The repository aims to provide Python 3 adapted source code examples from an ANTLR4 book, demonstrating how to use ANTLR4 for language parsing.
Description: Covert ANTLR4 book source code to Python3 version.

Purpose: This repository provides the formal and detailed specification, including its grammar, for the Kotlin programming language, targeting compiler writers, language enthusiasts, and power-users.
Description: Kotlin Language Specification:

Purpose: The repository provides a tool to parse LaTeX math expressions using an ANTLR grammar and convert them into equivalent SymPy forms.
Description: Parse LaTeX math expressions

Purpose: To provide robust ANTLR4-based SQL parsers for multiple database dialects, enabling metadata extraction, syntax validation, and lineage analysis for data platform products.
Description: 基于 antlr4 的多种数据库SQL解析器，获取SQL中元数据，可用于数据平台产品中的多个场景：ddl语句提取元数据、sql 权限校验、表级血缘、sql语法校验等场景。支持spark、flink、gauss、starrocks、Oracle、MYSQL、Postgresql，sqlserver,、db2等

Purpose: Provide a reusable TypeScript library for parsing various SQL dialects, generating Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs), and offering advanced language services such as validation, tokenization, code completion, and entity extraction.
Description: SQL Parsers for BigData, built with antlr4.

Purpose: A generic, multiplatform library for parsing source code into Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs) using ANTLR, currently supporting Kotlin with an extensible design for other languages.

Domain: Language Engineering, Model Transformation, Code Generation
Purpose: To provide a domain-specific language (Laconic) and associated tools for the parsimonious generation and understanding of Turing machines through a multi-stage compilation process.

Description: A high performance BitTorrent client for servers and seedboxes.

Description: examples to illustrate my YouTube channel's episode 118 about Databases

Domain: Syntax, Analysis, Refactoring, Transformation, IDE Tooling
Purpose: To provide comprehensive tooling, including IDE extensions and a command-line utility, for editing, analyzing, refactoring, and converting various context-free grammars like Antlr and Bison.

In addition to the IDE extensions provided here, a command-line tool is available to refactor grammars in order to make them cleaner, more readable, and more efficient.

Domain: Language Engineering, Grammar Transformation, Parse Tree Transformation, Syntax Analysis
Purpose: Trash is a collection of ~40 command-line tools to analyze and transform Antlr parse trees and grammars.

Purpose: The repository's goal is to provide a seamless and automated way to integrate Antlr4 grammar compilation into C# .NET projects by distributing a build-time NuGet package.

Purpose: To provide an extensible, web-based platform with core services and APIs for managing, analyzing, and reusing diverse MDE artifacts such as metamodels, models, transformations, and editors as software-as-a-service.
Description: MDEForge is an extensible modeling framework specifically conceived to support for discovery and reuse of existing modeling artefacts. MDEForge consists of a set of core services that permit to store and manage typical modeling artefacts and tools. Atop of such services it is possible to develop extensions adding new functionalities to the platform. All the services can be used by means of a Web access and by a REST API that permits to adopt the available model management tools as software-as-a-service.
